goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: Semantic defect: rich intake appears before purchase, contrary to the explicit post-purchase prompt. Render it open only when checked, add dedicated pre-purchase manual-extra quantity/unit controls, and expose a compatible intake submit name containing old/new phrases. Update only the new grocery E2E lifecycle; protected tests stay unchanged.

worker_package.objective: Repair ShoppingListEditor purchased-state intake visibility and dedicated extra controls, update only the new E2E interaction, then run focused/type/build and all three browser oracles.
verify: Require component/E2E pre-hashes and all protected hashes from T077.
Add accessible extra quantity/unit controls; render intake open only when checked; compatible submit accessible name includes both old/new phrases.
New E2E uses real UI checkbox/PATCH before intake and preserves 50g/450g/retry/formula assertions.
Run scoped format/lint, unchanged unit, typecheck, mirror/build.
Run new grocery and unchanged workflow/recipe E2Es, port/hash/diff integrity.
stop_if: Rich intake remains pre-purchase or missing post-purchase.
Protected/outside files must change or shared/live/secret/normal data touched.

evidence: Original brief prompts explicit Add to Pantry after purchased.
Protected workflow checks row then expects intake controls.
Manual extra currently borrows premature intake fields.

parallel_safety.rationale: Component lifecycle and new E2E are coupled with serial build/oracles.

required_board_updates: Keep T999 blocked and require another Judge.
